headline: Beauty essentials,
crafted with

hero.body: Formulated in partnership with Filipino experts. Proven in salons and stores nationwide. Made for people who expect more from everyday care.

featuredCategories.title: Shop by collection
featuredCategories.description: Four curated lines. One uncompromising standard. Find the routine that fits how you live.

aboutTeaser.title: A brand built on consistency, not hype.
aboutTeaser.teaser: For over 15 years, KGOLD has partnered with formulators and retailers who believe the same thing we do: everyday beauty should never feel like a compromise.
aboutTeaser.mission: We make thoughtfully formulated beauty essentials accessible through reliable partnerships — held to the same standard, every batch, every shelf.

values.title: Manufacturing standards
values.description: Every batch is traceable. Every facility is vetted. Every release meets our internal benchmark before it ships.

values.title: Ingredient integrity
values.description: Transparent labels. Responsible sourcing. No hidden fillers dressed up as innovation.

values.title: Partner accountability
values.description: We grow when our retailers grow — with fair terms, reliable supply, and products that sell themselves.

faqSection.title: General questions asked by customers.
faqSection.description: Our friendly team is always here to help you with quick, clear, and reliable answers whenever needed.

faq.question: Where can I buy KGOLD products?
faq.answer: KGOLD is available through 500+ partner locations nationwide — including salons, beauty stores, and select retailers. Contact us to find a store near you.

faq.question: Do you offer wholesale or distribution partnerships?
faq.answer: Yes. We work with distributors and retailers who share our quality standards. Email us at hello@kgoldbeauty.com and our team will respond within 2 business days.

faq.question: Are KGOLD products cruelty-free?
faq.answer: We do not test finished products on animals and work exclusively with partners who align with our cruelty-free commitments.

faq.question: What makes KGOLD different from other local brands?
faq.answer: Consistency. Our formulations are developed with Filipino experts, produced in GMP-aligned facilities, and proven in real retail environments — not just focus groups.

finalCta.title: Ready to bring KGOLD to your shelves?
finalCta.description: Partner with a brand your customers already trust. Reach out to explore wholesale, distribution, or collaboration opportunities.
